title: ervum stenophyllum
intro: Ervum stenophyllum, also known as horse gram, is a type of annual legume plant that belongs to the genus Ervum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to help lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Ervum stenophyllum include its potential to aid in weight loss, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as a tea, capsule, or powder, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
